name: In Utah like West Valley City, do I need a lawyer for work injury?
description: No, but yes for better payout—free until you win.

mainEntity.name: In Utah like West Valley City, do I need a lawyer for work injury?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, but yes for better payout—free until you win.
acceptedAnswer.description: Not required but highly recommended; attorneys boost settlements 2-3x, handle denials free upfront (contingency). Key factors: Insurers lowball without rep; complex rules in Utah Labor Commission. Free consults common. Contact local specialist to review your case.
